---
title: "Module Library"
---

# Reusable Teaching Modules

Use these pages to stage topic snippets that can later be pulled into slides.

- [Module 01: Foundations and Generalization](module-01-foundations.qmd)
- [Module 02: Regularization](module-02-regularization.qmd)
- [Module 03: Trees and Two Cultures](module-03-trees-and-cultures.qmd)
- [Module 04: Tidymodels Pipeline](module-04-pipeline.qmd)
- [Module 05: Advanced Models](module-05-advanced-models.qmd)
- [Module 06: Metrics, Imbalance, and SHAP](module-06-evaluation-and-interpretability.qmd)
